*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Pressure Ulcer to Sacral region / Measures 5.2 cm x 2.2 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. No odor noted. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Sacral region wound site, rates 2/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Sacral region measures 5.2 cm x 2.2 cm x 1.3 cm.
  Wound bed: 72% slough, 28% granulation tissue. Periwound: erythematous.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Pressure Ulcer pressure ulcer Sacral region — improving.
Plan: Nutritional consult ordered. Offloading boot applied.
